title: IssueUpdateDetails
description: Details of an issue update request.

fields.description: List of issue screen fields to update, specifying the sub-field to update and its value for each field. This field provides a straightforward option when setting a sub-field. When multiple sub-fields or other operations are required, use `update`. Fields included in here cannot be included in `update`.

properties.description: Details of issue properties to be add or update.

transition.description: Details of a transition. Required when performing a transition, optional when creating or editing an issue.

update.description: A Map containing the field field name and a list of operations to perform on the issue screen field. Note that fields included in here cannot be included in `fields`.
